title: Boats With Barrels
description: This simple resource pack changes the chest in chest boats to be a barrel!
body:
# Boats With Barrels

This resource pack replaces the chests in chest boats (and rafts!) with barrels. It doesn't change their functionality at all (because it's a resource pack, and because that's not my goal here).

## Quick Note

You may use these textures in other packs or whatever, but linking back to this Modrinth page would be appreciated.

## Join My Discord

- Make suggestions, report issues, etc.
- View my to-do list with all planned future updates and new packs
- Might get early access to new packs in future

https://discord.gg/TkFb7V8Bya

## Planned Updates

- Add support for older Minecraft versions
- Change the texture of the item icon to look more like a barrel instead of a chest
